summary: Strong test suite with comprehensive unit tests covering all core matrix generation logic (cartesian product, include/exclude semantics, feature flags, validation, error handling) and CLI behavior. Well-structured integration tests validate workflow structure, actionlint compliance, and end-to-end behavior via act. Good error path coverage including invalid JSON, missing files, validation violations, and type errors. Minor weaknesses: (1) act output validation uses loose regex patterns instead of strict JSON comparison, (2) only 3 integration test cases shown (fixtures not provided for review), (3) pattern-based assertions risk false passes if output format shifts slightly. Proper test isolation, clear naming, good fixture usage. Would catch most regressions, though edge cases with complex include/exclude combinations and boundary conditions (e.g., max_size equals expanded_size) could use deeper coverage.
